channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The AI Skills Gap Is Becoming A Real Business Risk
item.description: AI is scaling faster than workforce readiness. EC-Council’s new role-based AI certifications aim to help close the growing skills and governance gap.

item.title: Apple iOS 26.3: Critical iPhone Update Brings Key Upgrades To Millions
item.description: The next iPhone update is here with new features for all users and key changes for those in the EU.

item.title: iOS 26.3—Update Now Warning Issued To All iPhone Users
item.description: Apple has released iOS 26.3 fixing 39 security flaws — one of which is already being used in real-life attacks. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Ending Medicaid Coverage For GLP-1 Drugs Deepens Divide In Chronic Care
item.description: As states cut Medicaid coverage for GLP-1 drugs, access to obesity treatment is increasingly tied to income—raising questions for both Medicaid and Me...

item.title: 7 Proven Tips to Improve Customer Retention
item.description: Discover 7 proven tips on how to improve customer retention and boost your business's success. Learn effective strategies to keep your customers engag...

item.title: Key Steps in the HR Hiring Process
item.description: Discover the essential key steps in the HR hiring process to streamline recruitment, improve candidate selection, and enhance organizational efficienc...

item.title: 7 Essential Types of Commercial Real Estate Loans to Know
item.description: Discover the 7 essential types of commercial real estate loans you need to know before investing. Learn about financing options, benefits, and how to ...

item.title: For Now, Healthcare Powers U.S. Job Market. But Trouble Could Be Ahead
item.description: More than half of the U.S. job gains in Labor Department’s new employment report came from the healthcare sector but looming cuts in federal spending ...

item.title: Time well spent

item.title: SBA Eases Rebuilding for California Wildfire Survivors with New Rules

item.title: A starting point for the blog

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...

item.title: Vessel size
